RuleSet.Name: BuildSchema-wsl.bash
RuleSet.GenFile: #!/bin/bash $MssBashScriptLicense$ Revision=$$1 MAJOR_VERSION=$reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer Name$ MINOR_VERSION=$reference MinorVersion Name$ rm -f lib$lower PackageName$*.gz *.deb *.build *.dsc *.log *.changes ex.cmd pushd lib$lower PackageName$ if [ -f Makefile ]; then make distclean fi popd if [ ! -d /usr/bin/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$ ]; then sudo mkdir /usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$ fi sudo chmod 755 /usr/bin/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$ if [ ! -d /usr/bin/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION} ]; then sudo mkdir /usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION} fi sudo chmod 755 /usr/bin/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION} if [ ! -d /usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$ ]; then sudo mkdir /usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$ fi sudo chmod 755 /usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$ if [ ! -d /usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION} ]; then sudo mkdir /usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION} fi sudo chmod 755 /usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION} if [ ! -d /usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION}/cfgenkb ]; then sudo mkdir /usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION}/cfgenkb fi sudo chmod 755 /usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION}/cfgenkb if [ ! -d /usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION}/cfgenkbobj ]; then sudo mkdir /usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION}/cfgenkbobj fi sudo chmod 755 /usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION}/cfgenkbobj if [ ! -d /usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION}/cfgenkbram ]; then sudo mkdir /usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION}/cfgenkbram fi sudo chmod 755 /usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION}/cfgenkbram if [ ! -d /usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION}/msscf ]; then sudo mkdir /usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION}/msscf fi sudo chmod 755 /usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION}/msscf pushd lib$lower PackageName$ autoreconf -fi aclocal autoconf automake ./configure --prefix=/usr --disable-static CFLAGS='-g3 -Og -D_DEBUG ' CXXFLAGS='-g3 -Og -D_DEBUG -std=c++2a -I/usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION).0.$${MINOR_VERSION} -I/usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION).0.$${MINOR_VERSION} ' #./configure --prefix=/usr --disable-static CFLAGS='-O2 -DNDEBUG ' CXXFLAGS='-O2 -DNDEBUG -std=c++2a -I/usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION).0.$${MINOR_VERSION} -I/usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION).0.$${MINOR_VERSION} ' make clean time make sudo make install sudo rm -Rf /usr/include/$lower SchemaName$* /usr/include/msscf sudo chmod 755 /usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION}/$lower SchemaName$ sudo sh -c "cd /usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION}/$lower SchemaName$ && chmod 644 *.hpp" sudo chmod 755 /usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION}/$lower SchemaName$obj sudo sh -c "cd /usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION}/$lower SchemaName$obj && chmod 644 *.hpp" sudo chmod 755 /usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION}/$lower SchemaName$ram sudo sh -c "cd /usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION}/$lower SchemaName$ram && chmod 644 *.hpp" sudo chmod 755 /usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION}/msscf sudo sh -c "cd /usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION}/msscf && chmod 644 *.hpp" sudo chmod 755 /opt/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION}/xsd sudo chmod 644 /opt/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION}/xsd/*.xsd sudo chmod 755 /usr/lib/*$lower PackageName$.la sudo chmod 755 /usr/lib/*$lower PackageName$.so* sudo ldconfig popd
